DataSource.SQL: SELECT CONCAT('', usr.GetResourceText(itsGwfs.TitleResourceKey, @UserLanguageID), '') AS [State] ,itsGrmt.[TextValue] AS ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid ,itsSsr.[TextValue] AS ITSMSolutionSuspendReasonGuid ,itsAsr.[TextValue] AS ITSMApprovalSuspendReasonGuid ,itsReq.ID ,itsReq.ITSMKey ,itsReq.Subject ,itsReqParent.ID AS ParentTableID ,itsReqParent.ITSMKey AS ParentITSMKey ,itsReqParent.Subject AS ParentSubject ,accCreator.FullName AS AccountID ,itsReq.CreateDate ,accLastUpdate.FullName AS LastUpdateAccountID ,itsReq.LastUpdate ,groAssigned.[Name] AS AssignedGroupID ,accAssigned.[FullName] AS AssignedAccountID FROM (VALUES (0)) AS dual(zero) LEFT JOIN usr.{{FormIdent}} AS itsReq ON itsReq.ID = @ID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_GetWorkFlowState ('{{FormIdent}}WorkFlow') AS itsGwfs ON itsGwfs.[Value] = ISNULL(itsReq.[State], 1) LEFT JOIN usr.{{FormIdent}} AS itsReqParent ON itsReqParent.ID = itsReq.ParentTableID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS groAssigned ON groAssigned.ID = itsReq.AssignedGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accAssigned ON accAssigned.ID = itsReq.AssignedAccountID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accCreator ON accCreator.ID = ISNULL(itsReq.AccountID, @UserID) LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accLastUpdate ON accLastUpdate.ID = itsReq.LastUpdateAccountID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodType AS itsGrmt ON itsGrmt.Guid = itsReq.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid AND itsGrmt.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSolutionSuspendReason AS itsSsr ON itsSsr.Guid = itsReq.ITSMSolutionSuspendReasonGuid AND itsSsr.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMApprovalSuspendReason AS itsAsr ON itsAsr.Guid = itsReq.ITSMApprovalSuspendReasonGuid AND itsAsr.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID

DECLARE @ApprovedColor varchar(7) = '#4CAF50'; DECLARE @NotApprovedColor varchar(7) = '#ff7043';
SELECT CASE ISNULL(itsApp.IsApproved,0) WHEN 0 THEN @NotApprovedColor WHEN 1 THEN @ApprovedColor END AS BackgroundColor ,'#FFF' AS Color ,CASE WHEN itsApp.ApproverType = 'Group' THEN ISNULL(approverGro.[Name], '') WHEN itsApp.ApproverType = 'Account' THEN ISNULL(approverAcc.FullName, '') ELSE '' END AS Title FROM usr.ITSMApproval AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS approverGro on approverGro.ID = itsApp.ApproverGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS approverAcc on approverAcc.ID = itsApp.ApproverAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsApp.ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND itsApp.ApproveRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY ApproveOrder ASC

SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(itsApp.IsApproved,0) = 0, 0, 1)) AS Approved ,COUNT(*) AS Total FROM usr.ITSMApproval AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS approverGro on approverGro.ID = itsApp.ApproverGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS approverAcc on approverAcc.ID = itsApp.ApproverAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsApp.ApproveRoundGUID = @ActualApproveRoundGuid AND itsApp.ApproveRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

DECLARE @ApprovedColor varchar(7) = '#4CAF50'; DECLARE @NotApprovedColor varchar(7) = '#ff7043';
SELECT CASE ISNULL(itsApp.IsApproved,0) WHEN 0 THEN @NotApprovedColor WHEN 1 THEN @ApprovedColor END AS BackgroundColor ,'#FFF' AS Color ,CASE WHEN itsApp.AssessmentType = 'Group' THEN ISNULL(AssessmentGro.[Name], '') WHEN itsApp.AssessmentType = 'Account' THEN ISNULL(AssessmentAcc.FullName, '') ELSE '' END AS Title FROM usr.ITSMAssessment AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS AssessmentGro on AssessmentGro.ID = itsApp.AssessmentGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS AssessmentAcc on AssessmentAcc.ID = itsApp.AssessmentAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsApp.AssessmentRoundGUID = @ActualAssessmentRoundGuid AND itsApp.AssessmentRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL ORDER BY AssessmentOrder ASC

SELECT SUM(IIF(ISNULL(itsApp.IsApproved,0) = 0, 0, 1)) AS Approved ,COUNT(*) AS Total FROM usr.ITSMAssessment AS itsApp LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS AssessmentGro on AssessmentGro.ID = itsApp.AssessmentGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Account] AS AssessmentAcc on AssessmentAcc.ID = itsApp.AssessmentAccountID WHERE itsApp.TableID = @ID AND itsApp.FormIdent = @FormIdent AND itsApp.[State] != @DeletedState AND itsApp.AssessmentRoundGUID = @ActualAssessmentRoundGuid AND itsApp.AssessmentRoundStartDateTime IS NOT NULL HAVING COUNT(*) > 0

SELECT CONCAT('', usr.GetResourceText(itsGwfs.SimpleModeTitleResourceKey, @UserLanguageID), '') AS [State] ,itsGrmt.[TextValue] AS ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid ,itsSsr.[TextValue] AS ITSMSolutionSuspendReasonGuid ,itsAsr.[TextValue] AS ITSMApprovalSuspendReasonGuid ,itsReq.ID ,itsReq.ITSMKey ,itsReq.Subject ,itsReqParent.ID AS ParentTableID ,itsReqParent.ITSMKey AS ParentITSMKey ,itsReqParent.Subject AS ParentSubject ,accCreator.FullName AS AccountID ,itsReq.CreateDate ,accLastUpdate.FullName AS LastUpdateAccountID ,itsReq.LastUpdate ,groAssigned.[Name] AS AssignedGroupID ,accAssigned.[FullName] AS AssignedAccountID FROM (VALUES (0)) AS dual(zero) LEFT JOIN usr.{{FormIdent}} AS itsReq ON itsReq.ID = @ID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSM_GetWorkFlowState ('{{FormIdent}}WorkFlow') AS itsGwfs ON itsGwfs.[Value] = ISNULL(itsReq.[State], 1) LEFT JOIN usr.{{FormIdent}} AS itsReqParent ON itsReqParent.ID = itsReq.ParentTableID LEFT JOIN dbo.[Group] AS groAssigned ON groAssigned.ID = itsReq.AssignedGroupID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accAssigned ON accAssigned.ID = itsReq.AssignedAccountID LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accCreator ON accCreator.ID = ISNULL(itsReq.AccountID, @UserID) LEFT JOIN dbo.Account AS accLastUpdate ON accLastUpdate.ID = itsReq.LastUpdateAccountID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodType AS itsGrmt ON itsGrmt.Guid = itsReq.ITSMGeneralResolutionMethodTypeGuid AND itsGrmt.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMSolutionSuspendReason AS itsSsr ON itsSsr.Guid = itsReq.ITSMSolutionSuspendReasonGuid AND itsSsr.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID LEFT JOIN usr.ITSMApprovalSuspendReason AS itsAsr ON itsAsr.Guid = itsReq.ITSMApprovalSuspendReasonGuid AND itsAsr.LanguageID = @UserLanguageID
